free_text: He3-alpha scattering
Department of Physics
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is gas. (10-15 cmHg)
Institute for Nuclear Study
To separate proton groups
The uncertainty in the absolute scale
arising from the uncertainties in the
measurement of solid angle, normalization by
monitor counts or integrated beam current,
alignment of beam and slit system, and
measurement of the gas pressure
No information on source of uncertainties
V.D
